name: Mom's Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Choose large, attractive tomatoes and carefully scoop out the centers, leaving the bottoms intact. Set aside inside of tomatoes.
3. Toast bread slices and cut into 1/2-inch cubes. Pour oil from anchovies on the bread cubes.
4. Mash or mince the anchovies into fine pieces and mix them with the bread cubes and the inside of the tomatoes.
5. Add Parmesan cheese to the mixture (this will prevent it from getting too wet inside the tomatoes).
6. Spoon the mixture into the hollowed-out tomatoes and sprinkle 2 tablespoons of reserved Parmesan on top.
7. Place in an 8-inch square cake pan and carefully pour 1/2 inch of water around the tomatoes.
8. Bake for 30 minutes in a preheated 375°F oven. Serves: 4
